rationale: The cited paper is a close topical predecessor: it develops objective visual product-design measures (brand/segment typicality) linked to market outcomes, while the citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior marketing visual-design methods by automating visual characteristic discovery and quantification. Given this conceptual overlap and likely foundational role in the same visual design stream, this is not an obvious incidental mention. Even without in-text context, the evidence supports sending this pair to full relation judgment.
